summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Only Great Pizza Map Paris application. Backend API working excellently (90.6% success rate) with all core features functional. Frontend provides great user experience with interactive map, filtering, authentication, and all major features working correctly.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 403 instead of expected 401 for unauthorized access
minor_issues.impact: No functional impact - both indicate unauthorized access

minor_issues.issue: Some session persistence issues during extended automated testing
minor_issues.impact: Does not affect normal user experience

passed_tests: Map View loads with OpenStreetMap and pizza markers (red/yellow)
All 12 pizzerias display correctly on explore page
Pizzeria detail pages load with complete info
